industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Edisun Power Europe AG
summary: Edisun Power Europe AG, together with its subsidiaries, finances and operates photovoltaic systems in Europe. It also sells solar energy to local electricity companies. As of December 30, 2020, the company owned and operated 38 solar power plants with total capacity of 83.7 megawatts in Switzerland, Germany, France, Italy, Portugal, and Spain. Edisun Power Europe AG was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland.
